name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
Here's what I can do — tap /start to open the menu:

• Ask — general knowledge questions
• Image — generate a picture from a prompt
• Create doc — build a PDF, DOCX, or TXT file
• Convert — turn files between common formats

Everything is reachable by tapping. You can also type /ask, /image, /create_doc, or /convert with your text right after the command.

Files stay available for redownload for 7 days. Requests are kept for analytics for 90 days.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
